# datahub_ingestion_source (Data Source)

Looks up an existing DataHub Ingestion Source by `source_id`.

Use this data source to reference an ingestion source that already exists in DataHub -- for example, one created via the DataHub UI or a different Terraform root module.

## Finding `source_id` for a UI-created source

If the ingestion source was created in the DataHub UI, the `source_id` appears in the browser URL when you open the source detail page:

> `https://<your-datahub>/ingestion/sources/<source_id>`

## Recipe

The `recipe` attribute is returned as a JSON-encoded string. Use `jsondecode(...)` to access individual fields:

```terraform
output "warehouse_host" {
  value = jsondecode(data.datahub_ingestion_source.warehouse.recipe).source.config.host_port
}
```

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing ingestion source by its source_id.
# For UI-created sources the source_id appears in the browser URL:
#   https://<your-datahub>/ingestion/sources/<source_id>
data "datahub_ingestion_source" "warehouse" {
  source_id = "prod-postgres-warehouse-abc123"
}

# Export the URN for use by another Terraform root module or external tooling.
output "warehouse_urn" {
  value = data.datahub_ingestion_source.warehouse.urn
}

# Extract a field from the recipe. recipe is a JSON-encoded string;
# use jsondecode() to access individual fields.
output "warehouse_recipe_host" {
  value = jsondecode(data.datahub_ingestion_source.warehouse.recipe).source.config.host_port
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `source_id` (String) The unique identifier of the ingestion source to look up.

### Read-Only

- `cli_version` (String) Pinned `datahub-ingestion` CLI version. Empty if not pinned.
- `cron_interval` (String) Cron expression for the scheduled run interval. Empty if no schedule is configured.
- `debug_mode` (Boolean) Whether debug mode is enabled for this ingestion run.
- `extra_args` (Map of String) Additional key/value arguments passed to the ingestion executor.
- `id` (String) Mirrors `source_id`; provided for framework compatibility.
- `platform` (String) DataHub platform URN associated with the source (e.g. `urn:li:dataPlatform:postgres`). Empty if not set.
- `recipe` (String) Ingestion recipe as a JSON-encoded string. Use `jsondecode(...)` to access specific fields.
- `remote_executor_id` (String) Executor or Remote Executor Pool ID that runs this source. Empty if not set.
- `source_name` (String) Human-readable display name of the ingestion source.
- `source_type` (String) Ingestion source type (e.g. `postgres`, `bigquery`, `csv-enricher`).
- `timezone` (String) Timezone for `cron_interval` (e.g. `America/Los_Angeles`). Empty if no schedule is configured.
- `urn` (String) Full DataHub URN for this ingestion source (e.g. `urn:li:dataHubIngestionSource:prod-postgres-abc123`).
